## What changed

Describe the user-facing change and the problem it solves.

## Trust boundary

Does this change add or modify a provider, contract address, allowance spender, router, wallet signature, or transaction path?

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Addresses link to an official registry or verified source
- [ ] No secrets, wallet credentials, or personal information included
- [ ] User-facing claims avoid “audited”, “verified”, “safe”, or “official” unless supported
